title: Enhancement: Admin Webhook & Email Test Trigger with Rate Limiting
body:
### Description
Implement an administrative control endpoint `/api/admin/test-webhook` and corresponding UI elements in the Settings tab to allow owners and admins to trigger on-demand test notifications to verified Slack, Teams, and email endpoints.

### Requirements
- **Role Protection**: Endpoints must be strictly restricted to users with `admin` or `owner` roles.
- **Test Payload**: Message must contain a clear timestamp, the server's running version, and the email of the administrator who initiated the test.
- **Spam Prevention**: Implement a server-side sliding window rate limiter allowing at most 1 test request every 30 seconds per administrator to prevent spamming collaboration channels.
- **Dashboard Integration**: Add a 'Test Integrations' section under the Settings panel with an interactive trigger button showing loading state, success confirmations, and error alerts.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #1: Implement /api/admin/test-webhook endpoint with 30s rate limiting
issues.body:
### Tasks
1. Define test webhook API route `/api/admin/test-webhook` in `pkg/server/server.go`.
2. Apply administrator authentication and role verification checks.
3. Create an in-memory rate-limiter tracker (e.g. map of last-tested timestamps per admin).
4. Assemble and dispatch a formatted test payload containing the administrator's email and a dynamic timestamp.
5. Write unit tests validating authentication, payload format, and 30-second rate-limit blocks.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #2: Add 'Test Integration' panel and trigger button in Admin Dashboard UI
issues.body:
### Tasks
1. Add a 'Test Integrations' section in the settings container of `pkg/server/dashboard.html`.
2. Implement a 'Send Test Alert' button with loading states in `pkg/server/static/dashboard.js`.
3. Wire the button to make a POST request to `/api/admin/test-webhook` and handle rate limit (429) and success responses cleanly.
